description_long: This is a reusable grocery bag made from a light tan, paper-like material with a rectangular base and vertical sides. The bag features two wide, reddish-brown loop handles that are attached to the upper edges and extend down the front and back, providing sturdy grip points. The surface of the bag has a slightly crumpled, matte texture, suggesting it is flexible and lightweight. There are no visible logos, branding, or printed designs, giving it a plain and utilitarian appearance. The bag appears empty, as its sides are not bulging and the top is open with no contents visible. Its size and structure are typical for carrying groceries or other personal items in an urban environment.
description: A plain, tan reusable grocery bag with reddish-brown loop handles and a matte, slightly crumpled surface. The bag is empty and unbranded, with a top-facing open mouth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the bag with both reddish-brown loop handles clearly visible and the open top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the bag and the handles extending outward, with no visible contents.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, showing the other side of the bag and both handles, with the open top visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the handles, confirming the bag's empty state.
